CLAIM OF EXEMPTION PACKET RECEIVED FROM SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF DEPT.
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-25-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
ORDER DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT GABRIEL RUEDIGER'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE THE LEVIED FUNDS OF $ 279.42 FROM WELLS FARGO BANK TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR, DISCOVER BANK, FKA GREENWOOD TRUST COMPANY. CLAIMANT HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED THAT THE LEVIED FUNDS ARE EXEMPT PURSUANT TO CCP 704.010, 704.020, 704.040, OR 704.740,. (CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, 4.) ALTHOUGH CLAIMANT HAS PROVIDED A FINANCIAL STATEMENT, CLAIMANT DOES NOT MAKE HIS CLAIM ON THE BASIS THAT THE PROPERTY IS NECESSARY FOR HIS SUPPORT. (CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, 7.) ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-25-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT GABRIEL RUEDIGER'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is Denied. The levying officer is directed to release the levied funds of $ 279.42 from Wells Fargo Bank to the judgment creditor, Discover Bank, fka Greenwood Trust Company. Claimant has not demonstrated that the levied funds are exempt pursuant to CCP 704.010, 704.020, 704.040, or 704.740,. (Claim of Exemption, 4.) Although Claimant has provided a Financial Statement, Claimant does not make his claim on the basis that the property is necessary for his support. (Claim of Exemption, 7.) ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/eg
